user.title: Add Person
user.description: Set up caffeine tracking for a household member.

data_description.person_name: A display name for this person (e.g. Erik, Girlfriend).
data_description.half_life_hours: How long (hours) it takes for caffeine to halve in your body. Typical range: 3–7 h. Default 5 h.
data_description.sleep_safe_mg: Caffeine level (mg) at which you consider it safe to sleep. Default 50 mg.
data_description.enable_absorption: When enabled, caffeine is absorbed gradually instead of instantly. Adds an Estimated Peak Level sensor.
data_description.absorption_time_min: Exponential absorption time constant (minutes). Default 15 min → peak ~45–55 min after intake.

error.name_taken: A profile with this name already exists.

invalid_timestamp.message: Invalid timestamp. Use ISO 8601 format, e.g. 2024-06-01T08:30:00+02:00.

event_not_found.message: No event with the given ID was found.
